name: Bob Newhart
abstract: George Robert Newhart (September 5, 1929 – July 18, 2024) was an American comedian and actor. Newhart was known for his deadpan and stammering delivery style.

concerts.label: The Button Down Mind of Bob Newhart
Toyota Comedy Festival: Bob Newhart
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Avakian George
about_quotes.evidence: I met her quite by accident in Houston, Texas, when I went down to record Bob Newhart on his first job that he ever had.
about_quotes.doc_title: Avakian George — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Bergeron
about_quotes.evidence: Yeah I did an HBO special for Bob Newhart, you know, thirty years ago probably.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Bergeron interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 29, 2020
